languages.text: "Спасибо, спасибо! Йоваха... он как отец для многих из нас, понимаете? Мы обязаны ему. А вы..." {n}Юный сержант задумывается о чем-то.{/n}
"Thank you, thank you! Jovakha... he's like a father to a lot of us, you know? We owe him. And you..." {n}The young sergeant falls into reflection.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Спасибо, спасибо! Йоваха... он как отец для многих из нас, понимаете? Мы обязаны ему. А вы..." {n}Юный сержант задумывается о чем-то.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Thank you, thank you! Jovakha... he's like a father to a lot of us, you know? We owe him. And you..." {n}The young sergeant ponders something.{/n}
"Thank you, thank you! Jovakha... he's like a father to a lot of us, you know? We owe him. And you..." {n}The young sergeant falls into reflection.{/n}
"Thank you, thank you! Jovakha... he's like a father to a lot of us, you know? We owe him. May the God-Emperor protect you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The regiment will not forget this."
"Thank you, thank you! Jovakha... he's like a father to a lot of us, you know? We owe him. And you..." {n}The young sergeant ponders something.{/n}
"Thank you, thank you! Jovakha... he's like a father to a lot of us, you know? We owe him. And you..." {n}The young sergeant falls into reflection.{/n}

languages.text: 「ありがとうございます、ありがとうございます！ジョヴァハ…彼は私たちにとって父親のような存在です。私たちは彼に恩があります。神皇帝があなたを守ってください、御{mf|殿|女}様。連隊は決して忘れません」
languages.original_text: "Thank you, thank you! Jovakha... he's like a father to a lot of us, you know? We owe him. May the God-Emperor protect you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. The regiment will not forget this."

traits.locale_text: 「ありがとうございます、ありがとうございます！ジョヴァハ…彼は私たちにとって父親のような存在です。私たちは彼に恩があります。神皇帝があなたを守ってください、御{mf|殿|女}様。連隊は決して忘れません。」

languages.text: « Merci, merci infiniment ! Jovakha... C'est un père pour beaucoup d'entre nous, vous savez. Nous lui devons énormément. Quant à vous... » {n}Le jeune sergent s'interrompt un instant pour réfléchir.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Thank you, thank you! Jovakha... he's like a father to a lot of us, you know? We owe him. And you..." {n}The young sergeant falls into reflection.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Merci, merci infiniment ! Jovakha... C'est un père pour beaucoup d'entre nous, vous savez. Nous lui devons énormément. Quant à vous... » {n}Le jeune sergent s'interrompt un instant pour réfléchir.{/n}

languages.text: "Teşekkür ederim, teşekkür ederim! Jovakha... Çoğumuz için bir baba gibidir, biliyor musunuz? Ona borçluyuz. Ve sen..." {n}Genç çavuş düşüncelere dalıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Thank you, thank you! Jovakha... he's like a father to a lot of us, you know? We owe him. And you..." {n}The young sergeant falls into reflection.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Teşekkür ederim, teşekkür ederim! Jovakha... Çoğumuz için bir baba gibidir, biliyor musunuz? Ona borçluyuz. Ve sen..." {n}Genç çavuş düşüncelere dalıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Danke, danke! Jovakha ... er ist für viele von uns wie ein Vater, wisst Ihr? Wir verdanken ihm so viel. Und Ihr ..." {n}Der junge Sergeant versinkt in Gedanken.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Thank you, thank you! Jovakha... he's like a father to a lot of us, you know? We owe him. And you..." {n}The young sergeant falls into reflection.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Danke, danke! Jovakha ... er ist für viele von uns wie ein Vater, wisst Ihr? Wir verdanken ihm so viel. Und Ihr ..." {n}Der junge Sergeant versinkt in Gedanken.{/n}

languages.text: «Gracias, ¡gracias! Jovakha... es como un padre para muchos de nosotros, ¿sabe? Estamos en deuda con él. Y con usted». {n}El joven sargento queda pensativo.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Thank you, thank you! Jovakha... he's like a father to a lot of us, you know? We owe him. And you..." {n}The young sergeant falls into reflection.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Gracias, ¡gracias! Jovakha... es como un padre para muchos de nosotros, ¿sabe? Estamos en deuda con él. Y con usted». {n}El joven sargento queda pensativo.{/n}

languages.text: “谢谢，谢谢您！您知道吗？对我们很多人而言，约瓦哈就如同父亲一般。我们亏欠他太多了。还有您……”{n}年轻的军士陷入了沉思。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Thank you, thank you! Jovakha... he's like a father to a lot of us, you know? We owe him. And you..." {n}The young sergeant falls into reflection.{/n}
